llm_eval.notes: Well-decomposed (char/field/viz/_decide_verdict/_render_markdown/evaluate); runs end-to-end producing correct verdict and exit codes (0/1/2/64). Explicit threshold-order and file-existence validation with stderr msgs; no bare except. Writes only to out_dir with mkdir exist_ok, no network/secret/destructive ops. Deduction: no PEP-723 frontmatter; snapshot['sections'] direct subscript (trusted bundled ref).
